title: Technoblade Related
body:
Adds technoblade-related (because I wanted to centralize them in one place) mods.

so far the mods are

immortal technoblade

technoblade is dead..

technoblade pigs/technopigs

youtuber mobs

This Helps You Remember Technoblade

 This modpack is on Curseforge! 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/technoblade-related
